description: A faculty member is trying to use the plagiarism detection tool (e.g., Turnitin) integrated with the LMS, but it's not generating a report.

nodes.task_description: Identify the faculty member, course, and assignment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the context of the issue.

nodes.task_description: Check the assignment settings in the LMS to ensure the plagiarism tool was enabled correctly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the settings are correct.

nodes.task_description: Manually re-sync the assignment with the plagiarism detection service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent forces a refresh of the connection, which successfully generates the report.
